projects.intro:
Welcome to AgentFlow! This is a visual workflow orchestration tool.

Click the button below to create your first pipeline.
projects.hubIntro:
Don't want to start from scratch?

Browse ready-made pipelines on AgentFlow Hub — community-shared flows you can install and run in one click.

flow.intro:
Now you're in the flow editor.

Describe your requirements in natural language in the input box below, and AI will generate the flow graph.

The left node panel allows you to freely drag, delete, and adjust connections.
flow.introEmpty:
The canvas is empty. Start creating your flow!

Describe your requirements in natural language in the input box below, and AI will generate the flow graph.

The left node panel allows you to freely drag, delete, and adjust connections.

newPipeline.guideDesc: After entering the name and description, AI will automatically generate the flow graph. You can freely adjust nodes and connections in the editor.
newPipeline.nameHintGuide: e.g., MyFirstFlow (starts with a letter, supports numbers and underscores)
newPipeline.descPlaceholderGuide: e.g., Implement user login functionality with registration, verification, and authorization
newPipeline.descHintGuide: More detailed description leads to more accurate AI-generated flow
